name: Executable Regular Expression Error
description: The product uses a regular expression that either contains executable components with user-controlled input or allows users to enable execution via pattern modifiers. This is exploitable in languages like PHP (preg_replace with /e modifier) where regex evaluation can lead to arbitrary code execution.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node providing user input flows into a TRANSFORM node performing regex evaluation without a CONTROL node sanitizing or restricting executable regex modifiers. Look for regex operations where the pattern or replacement string is user-influenced.
